description: A plant operator reports a small chemical spill in a secondary containment area. The EHS department must document the incident and manage the cleanup.

nodes.task_description: Log the initial spill report, capturing the material, estimated quantity, location, and time.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates a new incident report with all initial details.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the Safety Data Sheet (SDS) for the spilled material to identify required PPE and cleanup procedures.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the correct SDS and identifies the proper handling precautions.

nodes.task_description: Dispatch the site's emergency response team to perform the cleanup and document the waste generated.

expected_outcome.value: Agent notifies the response team and updates the incident log with cleanup details and waste manifest information.
